_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutant mice with p19ARF gene loss develop accelerated hematopoietic disease resembling acute leukemia with a variable phenotype.

_contextSnippet: showed 70–90% engraftment four weeks post transplant by flow cytometry based upon the Ly5.1/Ly5.2 mismatch...expansion of Mac1+, GR1hi/lo cells in the bone marrow, spleen, and peripheral blood
details: Successfully used for flow cytometry analysis to assess engraftment based on Ly5.1/Ly5.2 mismatch and to characterize disease phenotypes including Mac1+, GR1+ cell populations
